dynavap-the-vong-x.summary: A flame-heated titanium and stainless steel vaporiser built for water-tool use, for patients who want battery-free dosing with glass filtration.
dynavap-the-vong-x.description: The VonG X is DynaVap's water-piece specialist. A tapered 10mm/14mm mouthpiece drops straight into standard female joints, so you can run it dry or through a bong or bubbler for cooler, smoother vapour. Heated with a butane torch or induction heater (sold separately), the high-mass tip holds heat for strong, consistent extractions, and the rotating mouthpiece lets you dial in airflow and draw resistance. No battery, no charging, just clean flavourful vapour from a device that will keep working for years. Suits patients who already use water tools and want to add a repairable, flame-powered option.

dynavap-the-vong.summary: A compact all-titanium DynaVap designed to fit 10-14mm water pieces, for patients who want flame-powered vapour through glass.
dynavap-the-vong.description: The VonG (i) Titanium is the smaller member of the DynaVap family, built to slot into 10-14mm female water pipes, bubblers and bongs as well as running dry. Heated with a butane torch (sold separately), it produces clean, flavourful vapour with no battery to charge or replace. Titanium construction makes it durable, repairable and light enough to carry anywhere. A good fit for patients who already own a water piece and want a battery-free device to pair with it.

dynavap-the-woodwynd.summary: A slim wood-stemmed DynaVap with an adjustable bowl, for patients who want flame-powered microdosing.
dynavap-the-woodwynd.description: The WoodWynd pairs a slim, ergonomic wooden stem with DynaVap's Helix Tip, whose adjustable bowl lets you control dose down to a microdose. The thick chamber walls roast herb evenly for consistent, flavourful vapour, and the oval airport on the stem lets you tune airflow to taste. It slides straight into 10mm water pieces with no tapering needed, and the stainless steel cap is built to last. Heated by butane torch (sold separately), with no battery to charge. Suits patients who want fine dose control and the option of water filtration in a comfortable, hand-friendly device.

dynavap-titanium-fall-colors.summary: A limited-edition all-titanium version of DynaVap's classic 'M', for patients who want the standard flame-powered vape in a more durable finish.
dynavap-titanium-fall-colors.description: The Titanium 'M' Fall Colors is the familiar DynaVap 'M' built entirely from lightweight titanium, with a surface treatment that improves scratch resistance and grip. Two finishes are offered: NebuluM, a smooth royal-purple with blue and violet accents, and QuantiuM, a textured radiant hue. Heated with a butane torch (sold separately), it covers a 150-230C range and produces clean, flavourful vapour with no battery. At around 20g it is pocketable, repairable and built to last for years. A good entry point for patients new to flame-powered vaping who want the durability of titanium.

vapman-click.summary: A handmade wooden butane vaporiser with a click mechanism that signals the right temperature, for patients who want flame-powered vapour without guesswork.
vapman-click.description: The Vapman Click takes the uncertainty out of flame heating. A bi-metal disc clicks when the gold-plated copper bowl reaches vaporising temperature, then resets at around 180C to prevent overheating, so you simply apply heat, listen for the click and draw. The same mechanism gently stirs the material for even extraction, and airflow adjusts via the twistable mouthpiece. It heats in about 5 seconds, takes up to 0.2g for microdosing or a fuller chamber, and the pre-charred cherry-wood body stays cool to hold and develops character with use. At 50g and handmade in Italy, it suits patients who want a portable, battery-free device that takes the guesswork out of torch heating.

vapman-lotus.summary: A handmade olive-wood butane vaporiser using pure convection, for patients who want clean draw-activated vapour with no electronics.
vapman-lotus.description: The Lotus is a pure-convection flame vaporiser built around a patented cap with six air channels that pull heated air evenly through your herb or concentrate. You heat the cap with a jet lighter for 3-5 seconds, then a steady draw activates vaporisation, producing dense vapour while preserving flavour. Because the chamber only heats when you draw, material isn't wasted. The olive-wood body insulates the device, stays comfortable to hold and develops a unique patina over time. Handmade in Italy from olive wood, stainless steel and glass, it suits patients who want convection performance without any battery or charging.

airvape-legacy-pro-2.summary: A hybrid-heating portable vaporiser for dry herb and concentrates with a gold-plated chamber and replaceable battery, for patients who want fast, flexible sessions.
airvape-legacy-pro-2.description: The AirVape Legacy Pro 2 combines convection and conduction heating with a gold-plated chamber and glass airpath for clean, full-flavoured vapour. It heats in under 15 seconds and gives full temperature control from 100C to 240C, so you can dial in your dose precisely. The 3200mAh battery is replaceable, and it charges over both USB-C and wirelessly. It handles dry herb and concentrates. A solid all-rounder for patients who want quick heat-up, fine temperature control and the long-term value of a user-replaceable battery.

airvape-legacy.summary: A pure-convection portable vaporiser with a removable 18650 battery, for patients who prioritise flavour and serviceability.
airvape-legacy.description: The AirVape Legacy Pro uses pure convection heating for clean, flavourful vapour, with full temperature control from 93C to 227C and a 15-second heat-up. It handles dry herb and concentrates, and includes a gold-plated basket for microdosing. The removable 18650 battery means you can swap in a fresh cell rather than wait to recharge, and it supports wireless charging. The body is made from hemp-based materials and non-animal leather, and it's backed by a limited lifetime warranty. Suits patients who want convection flavour and the long-term value of a serviceable, replaceable-battery device.

airvape-x-vaporizer.summary: A slim pocket-sized hybrid vaporiser for dry herb and concentrates with a full ceramic vapour path, for patients who want discretion.
airvape-x-vaporizer.description: The AirVape X is one of the slimmer portables available, designed to disappear into a pocket. Hybrid convection and conduction heating with an all-ceramic interior delivers smooth, clean-tasting vapour, and fully adjustable temperature control from 93C to 220C lets you set your dose by degree. It handles both dry herb and concentrates, with a 0.25g chamber and a clear LED display. Battery life is modest given the slim 1300mAh cell, so it suits lighter sessions rather than all-day heavy use. A good choice for patients who value a discreet, flat profile and ceramic flavour, backed by a limited lifetime warranty.

airvape-xs-go-vaporizer.summary: A lightweight, affordable dry-herb vaporiser with ceramic chamber and five presets, for patients starting out or wanting a simple backup.
airvape-xs-go-vaporizer.description: At 57g the AirVape XS GO is about as light and pocketable as portables get. Single-button operation and five temperature presets keep it simple, hybrid heating with a ceramic chamber and ceramic vapour path gives clean flavour, and built-in tools mean less to carry. The 0.3-0.4g chamber suits everyday dosing. The ABS plastic body keeps cost and weight down rather than feeling like a high-end shell, which is the trade-off at this price. A sensible first vaporiser or simple backup, backed by a limited lifetime warranty.

arizer-air-se-vaporizer.summary: A glass-stem portable vaporiser with a swappable 18650 battery and five presets, for patients who want simple, reliable dosing on the go.
arizer-air-se-vaporizer.description: The Arizer Air SE keeps things straightforward: five temperature presets, a glass aroma tube for clean flavour, and a removable 18650 battery you can swap in seconds rather than waiting to recharge. Heat-up is fast and results are consistent session to session. It can be used while charging, so it never has to be out of action. The glass stem means a little more care when carrying, but it's a big part of why the vapour tastes so clean. A dependable, no-fuss option for patients who value flavour and a serviceable battery.

arizer-go-argo.summary: A pocket-sized hybrid vaporiser with an all-glass vapour path and full temperature control, for cost-conscious patients who want discretion.
arizer-go-argo.description: The Arizer ArGo is one of the smallest dry-herb vaporisers around, but it keeps the glass aroma tube that gives Arizer its clean, flavourful vapour. Hybrid convection and conduction heating with manual temperature control from 45C to 220C lets you set your dose by degree, and presets are there if you'd rather keep it simple. The 0.2g chamber suits microdosing and lighter sessions, and heat-up takes 30-60 seconds. Small enough to stay genuinely discreet. A good fit for patients who want Arizer flavour in a budget-friendly, pocketable device, backed by a 2-year warranty.

auxo-calent-vaporizer.summary: A dual-heating portable vaporiser for dry herb with app control and a long-life battery, for patients who want a durable everyday device.
auxo-calent-vaporizer.description: The Auxo Calent pairs conduction with infrared heating in a compact aluminium body, heating in 20-30 seconds with four preset temperatures across a 180-220C range. A 360-degree zirconia ceramic mouthpiece and magnetic lid make loading and use easy, and the 2900mAh battery supports around 90 minutes of use per charge over USB-C. Optional Bluetooth app connectivity unlocks finer control for those who want it. Backed by a 10-year warranty, it suits patients who want a robust, well-built everyday vaporiser at a sensible price.

auxo-celsius-vaporizer.summary: A dual-heating portable vaporiser for dry herb and concentrates with app control, for patients who want one device for both materials.
auxo-celsius-vaporizer.description: The Auxo Celsius handles both dry herb and concentrates, with a separate concentrate chamber included. Conduction and infrared heating cover a wide 140-260C range across four preset levels, with finer adjustment through the companion app, and the stainless steel heater is easy to clean. USB-C fast charging gives around 90 minutes of use per charge, and it can be used while charging above 20%. Note the app is Android and web only, not iOS. Backed by a 10-year warranty, it suits patients who want a single versatile device for both flower and extracts.

auxo-cenote.summary: A portable electronic dab rig for concentrates with app control and replaceable ceramic nails, for patients who medicate with extracts.
auxo-cenote.description: The Auxo Cenote is a battery-powered dab rig built for concentrates on the go. Disposable ceramic nails make loading and cleaning simple, and temperature runs across three presets plus a Pro Mode in the AUXO app for finer control over a 200-340C range. A glass recycler mouthpiece cools the vapour, and you get around 12 sessions per charge with both wireless and USB-C charging. At 320g with a travel case included, it's portable rather than pocketable. Suits patients who prefer concentrates and want a self-contained rig without a torch, backed by a 10-year warranty.

boundless-cfx.summary: A hybrid portable vaporiser for dry herb and concentrates with fast heat-up and full temperature control, for patients who want strong sessions at a fair price.
boundless-cfx.description: The Boundless CFX heats in 20-25 seconds and gives full temperature control from 37C to 221C, with an 80W element driving hybrid convection and conduction heating through a ceramic chamber. The large 0.6g chamber suits fuller sessions, and an included pod lets you run waxes and oils as well as dry herb. An OLED screen and vibration alerts keep things simple. It's on the bulkier side at 208g, the trade-off for the big chamber and power. A capable all-rounder for patients who want fast, strong sessions, backed by a 3-year warranty on the unit.

boundless-dv8-from-bmic.summary: A stainless steel hybrid vaporiser for dry herb with a wide temperature range and zirconia mouthpiece, for patients who want a robust, serviceable device.
boundless-dv8-from-bmic.description: The Boundless DV8 is a metal-bodied hybrid vaporiser with a wide 31C to 240C temperature range and a 0.6g ceramic chamber for fuller sessions. Heat-up takes 20-25 seconds, the zirconia drip-tip keeps vapour cool, and the LiPo battery and USB-C charging keep it serviceable. It comes well-equipped with spare screens, storage pods and a stir tool. An OLED screen and vibration alerts make it easy to use. The stainless steel build is durable but adds weight. Suits patients who want a tough, well-stocked dry-herb device, though the warranty on the unit is shorter at 1 year.

davinci-artiq-vaporizer.summary: A 510 cartridge vaporiser with an extended cooling airpath and three heat modes, for patients prescribed oil cartridges.
davinci-artiq-vaporizer.description: The DaVinci Artiq is built for 510-threaded oil cartridges, with an extended airpath that cools vapour noticeably before it reaches you, which helps if harsh draws are a problem. Three voltage-based heat modes (1.8v to 3.6v) let you tailor temperature and draw to the cartridge you're using, and the airflow cartridges manage heat and draw resistance. USB-C charging, anodised aluminium body, and a clean, simple design. It is specifically a cartridge device, not a dry-herb vaporiser, so it suits patients prescribed oil cartridges who want a cooler, smoother draw. Backed by a 1-year warranty.
